qa_pair.question: Find all messages in the INBOX folder and identify which one has the most recent date. What is the message ID of the most recent message?
qa_pair.answer: The message ID varies based on your Gmail account

qa_pair.question: Count how many messages are in the SENT folder. Return the total number.
qa_pair.answer: The total number varies based on your Gmail account

qa_pair.question: Search for messages from yourself. How many messages did you find?
qa_pair.answer: The total number varies based on your Gmail account

qa_pair.question: List all system labels in Gmail. How many system labels are there?
What is the label ID for the INBOX system label?
Search for messages with the word "meeting" in the subject. Return the message ID of the first result.
qa_pair.answer: The message ID varies based on your Gmail account

qa_pair.question: List all user-created labels (labels with type "user"). How many are there?
qa_pair.answer: The number varies based on your Gmail account

qa_pair.question: Get details of the FIRST message in the TRASH folder. What is the snippet of that message?
qa_pair.answer: The snippet varies based on your Gmail account

qa_pair.question: How many messages are in the DRAFT folder at most? (Hint: use maxResults parameter)
qa_pair.answer: The actual count varies, but maxResults limits to 20 by default
